sections.description: A lightweight, modular Elementor extension companion.
sections.changelog:
1.1.0

  • Fixed ZIP file path extraction issue during updates.

1.0.9

  • Finalized automated cache monitor logic to avoid transient blockages.
  • Confirmed author name update to Jarrod Clark.

1.0.8

  • Updated Author name to Jarrod Clark (Auto-Update Verification Test).
